description: Reusable Metal 3D viewport for CAD apps on iOS and macOS: geometry-agnostic rendering companion to OCCTSwift, no OCCT dependency. Blinn-Phong shading, shadow/env maps, orbit camera, GPU picking.
rules: Import with `import OCCTSwiftViewport`. The library is geometry-agnostic and has NO OCCT dependency — it renders meshes, not OCCT shapes.
The SwiftUI view is `MetalViewportView`, driven by a `ViewportController`; add geometry to the controller's scene.
Supply geometry as `ViewportBody` (positions / normals / indices). Convert from OCCT in your app (e.g. via OCCTSwiftTools) — never import OCCT here.
Drive the camera with `CameraController` / `CameraState`; start from a `*Configuration` preset rather than hand-setting fields.
GPU face/vertex picking returns a `PickResult`; use `SceneRaycast` for explicit ray queries and `ProjectionUtility` for screen-to-world math.
Section views use `ClipPlane`; `ViewCubeView` is the standard orientation widget; `NormalSmoothing` controls shaded-normal generation.
